notes: Window dominated by the ongoing US-Iran/Saudi conflict. In-window negative coverage was almost entirely regional-security/geopolitics: the Houthi naval blockade declaration against Saudi Arabia (NBC News, CNBC, Reuters, 20 Jul) and Gulf bourses retreating as hostilities intensified (Reuters, 19 Jul), both used in the Negative Articles section. Several other in-window hits on the same theme were excluded as ineligible sources (Israeli outlets: Ynetnews, The Jerusalem Post) or fell outside the 24h window (New York Post travel-warning piece dated 18 Jul). Watchdog/NGO search (Amnesty, HRW, ALQST, RSF, CPJ, DAWN, etc.) returned only out-of-window material. No in-window culture-specific negative/reputational stories surfaced from eligible outlets.
